description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Windows and one for Linux. The Windows job runs on a windows-2019 environment, checks out the repository, generates a project with genie.exe, and builds the engine with MSBuild. The Linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, generates a project with genie, installs required packages, and builds the engine with make.
